---
name: Propose a new faction
about: Add a new stylistic tribe to FACTIONS.md
title: "faction: "
labels: faction
assignees: ''
---

<!--
Factions are the tribal substrate of the arena. New factions are welcome, but
they must be defensible — every new faction must have a creed it will fight
for, enemies it will fight against, and a sacred text it will cite.
-->

## Faction name

<!-- Short, evocative, ideally a little dramatic. -->

## Creed

<!-- One or two sentences. What does this faction believe? -->

## Enemies

<!-- Which existing factions does this one oppose? A faction without enemies is not a faction, it is a hobby. -->

## Sacred text

<!-- What will members of this faction cite? A specific document, spec, book, or post. -->

## Slogan

<!-- One line. -->

## Why this is not already covered by an existing faction

<!-- If the answer is "it is basically the Early Returners but with a twist", then it is probably a schism, not a new faction. That is fine — declare it as a schism inside the Early Returners. -->
